serviceTiers.name: Budget
serviceTiers.description: Accessible starter packages for small projects and focused fixes.

services.title: Website Maintenance / Modification / Editing
services.description: Scoped website updates, bug fixes, content edits, and minor feature enhancements to keep your site running smoothly.

services.title: Digital Business Card
services.description: A polished, mobile-first digital business card that makes your contact info easy to share and trust.

services.title: Landing Page
services.description: A focused single-page site designed to turn visitors into leads, signups, bookings, or sales.

services.title: Digital Portfolio
services.description: A polished portfolio site that presents your work, skills, and contact details clearly.

services.title: Single-Purpose Desktop Utility
services.description: A focused desktop utility for one clear workflow, automation, calculation, or file task.

services.title: Basic Website
services.description: A simple, 5-page website made from scratch with custom design, basic functionality, and instructions on hosting.

services.title: Discord Bot
services.description: A focused Discord bot for moderation, utility commands, community workflows, or lightweight automation.

serviceTiers.name: Standard
serviceTiers.description: More complex builds for tools, stores, dashboards, and web apps.

services.title: AI Chatbot
services.description: A custom chatbot that answers questions, captures leads, supports customers, or guides users through workflows.

services.title: Interactive Training Tools
services.description: Interactive training tools, educational simulations, quizzes, and onboarding software that help people learn by doing.

services.title: Starter E-commerce Site
services.description: A starter online store with product listings, shopping cart, checkout flow, payment setup, and responsive storefront design.

services.title: Desktop Software Development
services.description: Polished desktop software for business workflows, automation, data handling, and internal tools.

services.title: Web App
services.description: An app-like website with responsive UX, fast loading, optional offline support, and workflows built for repeat use.

services.title: Database & Admin Panel
services.description: A secure database-backed admin panel for managing records, users, content, reports, and operational data.
